basics.name: Russell Batchelor
basics.headline: IT Operations & Onboarding Manager | JML at Scale | Service Delivery | NHS · Government · Finance | SC + NPPV3 Cleared

summary.title: Professional Profile
summary.content: Hands-on IT Operations and Onboarding specialist with deep technical operations background and 25+ years delivering service continuity, large-scale JML processes, and on-site IT support across complex, regulated, and high-volume environments. Experienced managing onboarding waves of 1,000-42,000 users, coordinating service desk and D&T teams, troubleshooting directly with end users, and maintaining operational governance within major programmes, including NHS, UK Central Government, Tier 1 financial services, and defence. Trusted to mobilise large staff cohorts within governance-heavy public sector and grant-funded programme environments. SC and NPPV3 cleared (both active), available within 2 weeks. Comfortable being the visible, on-site person who fixes problems rather than just escalating them.

items.position: Infrastructure Programme Manager, Live Estate Modernisation (Part-time, concurrent with Collective IP)
items.description:
On-site IT operations and onboarding lead across live NHS Trust estates, visible point of contact between users, service teams, vendors, and programme governance in always-on, zero-disruption healthcare environments.

  • Managed site readiness and user access sequencing across Windows 11 rollout waves covering ~5,000 NHS staff across multiple active Trust sites, coordinating device provisioning, network readiness, JML access rights, and user onboarding to ensure 100% productivity at each cutover point.
  • Served as the on-site IT interface for NHS stakeholders, troubleshooting access, device, and connectivity issues directly with end users while coordinating resolution through service desk teams using ITSM tooling (ServiceNow), tracking open tickets and SLA performance in real time.
  • Coordinated bulk onboarding activity across hiring waves, managing Joiners, Movers, Leavers processes including system access provisioning, device allocation, and user readiness for clinical and administrative staff.
  • Maintained onboarding documentation, change governance, and operational reporting throughout live deployments, tracking progress, open issues, and stakeholder communications across concurrent site programmes.
  • Ran escalation management and risk reporting for programme leadership, resolving issues at source before they reached programme level, fixing problems, not just escalating them.

items.position: Technical Programme Manager (Part-time, concurrent with Atos)
items.description:
Senior delivery lead for concurrent infrastructure and technology transformation programmes across regulated environments, responsible for operational coordination, service desk liaison, and service continuity across multiple simultaneous client engagements.

  • Coordinated delivery across Digital and Technology teams, third-party suppliers, and client programme stakeholders, acting as the operational bridge between IT functions and programme teams across 4+ concurrent client engagements.
  • Established clear accountability and escalation paths across fast-moving, high-volume workstreams, tracking service requests, open tickets, and delivery milestones through structured reporting and ITSM-aligned governance.
  • Managed JML processes and access provisioning for programme teams, ensuring staff were onboarded with appropriate system access, devices, and support from day one.
  • Maintained RAID logs and operational governance across concurrent programmes, ensuring issues were resolved quickly and dependencies managed proactively.

items.position: Technology, Risk & Programme Assurance (Senior Ops Lead)
items.description:
Independent advisory and senior operations lead providing technology, risk, and programme assurance to organisations undertaking complex transformation and change programmes, including private equity-backed portfolio engagements.

  • Senior Ops lead for concurrent infrastructure and technology transformation programmes across regulated environments, responsible for operational coordination, service desk liaison, and service continuity across multiple simultaneous client engagements.
  • Provided independent advisory and operational delivery for a ~£20M PE-backed online portfolio engagement, managing stakeholder alignment, delivery assurance, and operational governance across the investment lifecycle.
  • Conducted operational and delivery assessments, identifying root causes of service failures, access issues, and process breakdowns; produced clear remediation plans for client leadership.
  • Coordinated delivery across Digital and Technology teams, third-party suppliers, and client programme stakeholders, acting as the operational bridge between IT functions and programme teams across 4+ concurrent client engagements.
  • Established clear accountability and escalation paths across fast-moving, high-volume workstreams, tracking service requests, open tickets, and delivery milestones through structured reporting and ITSM-aligned governance.
  • Managed JML processes and access provisioning for programme teams, ensuring staff were onboarded with appropriate system access, devices, and support from day one.
  • Reviewed vendor performance and capability against contractual commitments, challenging scope and sequencing assumptions on behalf of client teams.
  • Maintained RAID logs and operational governance across concurrent programmes, ensuring issues were resolved quickly and dependencies managed proactively.

Appointed as country-level Operations Director to build and run a greenfield digital and HFT infrastructure platform from mobilisation through to live board-governed service, owning the full operational model, team, and commercial lifecycle in-country. Deep technical operations background applied hands-on throughout.

  • Managed a team of 24 multilingual engineers across live operational shifts, overseeing JML processes, access provisioning, system permissions, and device management across 1,200+ endpoints and 7 infrastructure locations.
  • Acted as the primary IT and operations point of contact for the in-country business, resolving infrastructure, connectivity, and service issues hands-on while maintaining uptime across revenue-critical systems.
  • Designed and delivered the operational handover model, including user access frameworks, SLA baselines, and service performance reporting to board level.
  • Governed a multi-vendor supplier ecosystem under tight latency and uptime requirements, managing supplier performance, escalations, and contract obligations across live operations.

De facto EMEA Operations Director over a 4-year tenure, accountable for service delivery performance, commercial governance, and operational control across a live portfolio of 15+ concurrent programmes for Tier 1 finance, UK Government, NATO, and NHS clients.

  • Oversaw end-to-end IT operations across regulated multi-sector environments, coordinating service desk teams, field engineers, and third-party suppliers to maintain SLA performance across 130+ active sites.
  • Managed 7,000+ endpoint deployments and 6,100+ circuit migrations across EMEA, directing access provisioning, device rollouts, and user readiness in parallel with infrastructure delivery.
  • Led pan-European network upgrade across 200+ NATO airbases (£10M+ programme), managed a 30-person cross-border engineering team; when on-site delivery was slipping, flew to Germany and restructured the ground team to restore programme cadence.
  • Produced C-Suite operational reporting and executive governance packs across all active programmes, tracking KPIs, open incidents, risk positions, and supplier performance.
  • Governed procurement, SLA performance, billing accuracy, and vendor management from contract signature through to service continuity across all programmes.

Operations delivery lead for large-scale technology change programmes driven by corporate M&A and estate transformation, responsible for end-to-end JML coordination, device rollouts, and on-site IT support across multi-country European environments.

  • Led JML and laptop rollout programme for major credit card payments company, onboarded ~3,500 users across Windows upgrades, device provisioning, access rights, and user readiness in occupied commercial environments.
  • Directed global Windows JML and upgrade programme for Anon across ~25,000 endpoints worldwide, coordinating bulk user onboarding, device deployment, access sequencing, and service continuity throughout live cutover windows.
  • Oversaw Wi-Fi deployments across approximately 25,000 endpoints in occupied commercial buildings, managing user impact, access sequencing, and service continuity throughout live environments.
  • Coordinated 7 data centre transitions from on-premises to off-premises facilities, managing decommissioning, migration sequencing, and operational handover across multiple concurrent workstreams.
  • Built operational control frameworks and documentation standards ensuring consistent delivery governance across complex international multi-vendor programmes.

Programme delivery and JML coordination across multiple UK Central Government transformation programmes under GDS assurance standards, leading large-scale EUC, Microsoft 365, and Windows migration rollouts with hands-on onboarding delivery.

  • Led Microsoft 365 and Windows onboarding for Home Office (~42,000 users) and MHCLG (~4,000 users), coordinating bulk JML provisioning, access migration, device deployment, user readiness, and service desk integration across both programmes.
  • Delivered JML-driven Windows and laptop upgrades to Microsoft 365 for Ofsted (~1,000 users), FSA (~2,000 users), and PINS (~1,000 users), managing end-to-end onboarding, system access, and user support across each department.
  • Managed JML migration and device rollout for Direct Line (~5,000 users), coordinating user onboarding, access provisioning, and operational cutover across the organisation.
  • Managed procurement strategy and delivery coordination across networking, cloud, EUC, and virtualisation platforms for 7 central government departments.
  • Authored bid responses and RFP submissions covering delivery methodology, ITSM governance models (including ServiceNow workflows), and operational assumptions for client-facing review.

De facto technology operations lead for a 5,000-employee local authority across 140+ sites, retained over 7 years to deliver major network, telephony, and procurement programmes alongside day-to-day service governance and JML operations.

  • Delivered JML onboarding and migration of ~2,000 users to Microsoft 365, coordinating access provisioning, device deployment, user readiness, and service desk integration across the authority.
  • Achieved 60% WAN cost reduction across 200+ sites through strategic network redesign and supplier renegotiation.
  • Led £12M voice and data services re-tender, full commercial lifecycle from strategy through vendor selection, award, and transition to managed service, including SLA framework design.
  • Deployed and governed telephony infrastructure for 5,000 staff across a distributed public sector estate, maintaining service continuity throughout cutover phases.

items.name: Career Outcomes
items.description:
• Microsoft 365 onboarding and access migration for ~42,000 Home Office users and ~5,000 MHCLG staff, coordinated bulk JML provisioning, user readiness, and service desk integration across both programmes under GDS assurance
  • End-to-end JML and laptop rollout programme for global payments company, onboarded ~3,500 users across Windows upgrades, device provisioning, and access rights in occupied commercial environments
  • Global Windows JML and upgrade programme for Anon, ~25,000 endpoints worldwide; coordinated bulk user onboarding, device deployment, and service continuity across live cutover windows
  • NHS Windows 11 JML rollout across ~5,000 clinical and administrative staff, managed site readiness, access sequencing, and 100% user productivity at each cutover point; ServiceNow-based ticket tracking and SLA governance throughout
  • Multiple UK Government department onboarding programmes (Ofsted ~1,000, FSA ~2,000, PINS ~1,000), delivered JML-driven Windows and Microsoft 365 upgrades on time across each department
  • 60% WAN cost reduction across 200+ London Borough of Lambeth sites; led £12M voice and data services re-tender, full commercial lifecycle from strategy through award and transition; delivered JML migration of ~2,000 users to Microsoft 365
  • De-facto EMEA Operations Director (CentricsIT, 4 years), portfolio of 15+ concurrent programmes across Tier 1 finance, NATO, NHS, and UK Government; 6,100+ circuit migrations, 7,000+ endpoint deployments
  • Country Operations Director (International Gaming & HFT Group, Bulgaria), ran P&L and in-country team (24 engineers); JML for 1,200+ endpoints across 7 IDCs, board-level KPI governance from Day 1

items.title: ITIL
items.issuer: ITIL-aligned delivery across NHS, Government, and Finance programmes

items.content:
• Charles Stanley & Co., Infrastructure Consultant (~2007)
  • Comunica, Operations Manager (~2005)
  • Ipitomi Ltd, Co-Founder & MD (subscription managed-services startup) (~2001)
  • Virgin Media, Non-Standard Technical Design Authority (1998-2000)
  • Whittington Insurance Markets, Head of Support & Networks (~1996)

Notable: Northern Ireland Schools Connectivity Programme (Virgin Media / DoE, 1998-2000), Programme lead and Non-Standard Design Authority for broadband, fibre, and leased-line connectivity across all 2,000 schools in Northern Ireland; 100% completion over 2-year DoE mandate. First time every school in Northern Ireland had internet access.

Vehicle: Hiloka Limited (sole director) | Target rate: £550-£650/day (flexible for right-fit programme engagement) | Availability: Within 2 weeks

Engagement type: SoW / output-based contracts | Location: UK-based; proven European and US delivery footprint | Predominantly office-based / on-site delivery model, experienced with full-time on-site IT operations delivery

metadata.notes: V2, All scorecard feedback applied: headline reframed for hands-on IT Ops/Onboarding, quantified JML metrics added across Atos (5K NHS), Sitehands (3.5K payments + 25K Anon), Rainmaker (Home Office 42K, MHCLG 4K, Ofsted 1K, FSA 2K, PINS 1K, Direct Line 5K), Lambeth (2K O365), Career Outcomes reordered with onboarding first, rate adjusted to £550-650/day flexible, ITIL reframed as knowledge/applied, ServiceNow added to skills and experience bullets, concurrent role clarification added, all skills unhidden for ATS, public sector programme context added to summary.

jobContext.job_description: IT Onboarding and Operations Manager Rate £500 to £600 per day Inside IR35 Contract Initial 9 months with strong likelihood of extension or transition into IT Manager Location Stratford, London Predominantly office based, initially 5 days per week Overview The British Council is delivering a major national programme as part of Erasmus+ and requires an experienced IT Operations and Onboarding specialist to support the mobilisation of over 150 staff across the UK.
